native_compile.note: Native Rust compile is exposed as one inclusive call by the current engine API.

native_bank_from_source.note: Includes the Python Bank cache wrapper and one native Rust construction call.

native_compile.note: source-cache hit reused a compiled bank

native_bank_from_source.note: Source-cache hit reused a compiled bank; Rust construction was skipped.
